prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid) with billet compressor wheel (64mm inducer, 88mm exducer) and Inconel turbine wheel (72mm) to support 950+ hp on the **F163CE** 1.6L V6 hybrid power unit, paired with a **Motec M150 ECU** for precise fuel and ignition mapping under extreme boost (3.2 bar absolute).

Install a **Pankl Racing Systems** titanium connecting rod set (H-beam, 144mm length) with **ARP Custom Age 625+** rod bolts (220,000 psi tensile strength) to handle the increased cylinder pressures, alongside a **JE Pistons** forged aluminum piston kit (9.5:1 compression, DLC-coated skirts) for the F163CE’s 90mm bore.

Replace the OEM MGU-K with a **Magneti Marelli** high-output electric motor (250 kW peak, 120 kW continuous) and a **Williams Advanced Engineering** 800V battery pack (1.2 kWh capacity, 400A discharge) to optimize energy deployment under sustained 12,000 RPM operation, paired with a **Bosch MS2.9** hybrid control unit for seamless power delivery.
estetica: Fit a **Novitec Rosso SF90** carbon fiber widebody kit (front fenders extended by 40mm, rear by 50mm) with integrated **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** side skirts and a **Rocket Bunny** ducktail spoiler (3D-printed carbon, 12kg downforce at 250 km/h).

Install **BBS FI-R** forged magnesium wheels (19x12 front, 20x13 rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** semi-slick tires (285/30 R19 front, 345/30 R20 rear) and **HRE Performance Center Lock** adapters for rapid pit-stop changes, finished in **BBS Gold PVD** coating.

Apply a **3M 1080 Matte Graphite Black** full-body vinyl wrap with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** accents (gloss Ferrari Rosso Corsa on the front splitter, diffuser, and mirror caps), paired with **Oracle Lighting** RGB LED underglow (addressable, 6000K, 120W) and a **Lumma Design** carbon fiber front grille insert (honeycomb mesh, 50% airflow increase).
